message:
chore(build): add test artifact ignores and improve mock debugging

ESLint Configuration:
- Add coverage/, playwright-report/, and test-results/ to ignore list
- Prevents lint errors on generated test artifacts
- Keeps CI clean when test reports are generated locally

Framer Motion Mock:
- Add displayName to motion.div, motion.span, motion.button
- Improves React DevTools debugging experience
- Makes component tree more readable during test debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
